assumptions: Existing PR comments and stdout JSON expose one-to-one issue status but do not persist local per-issue history.
docs/CHANGELOG.md is aggregate history and should not be overloaded as the detailed issue ledger.
--disable-changelog should also disable the auto review ledger in test/tooling contexts.
risks: Writing the ledger after feedback would miss the auto-pushed commit.
Writing resolved before push-block checks would mislabel blocked fixes.
Committing ledger-only changes when no issue was fixed could create noisy PR commits.
